title: Le verdi bandiere di Allah
writer: Adriano Bolzoni, Umberto Lenzi, Sergio Leone
actors: José Suárez, Linda Cristal, Cristina Gaioni
plot: Saracen pirates aboard the "Black Eagle" attack Christians strongholds along the coast of Spain. When they stop off in Sheba to re-supply, they also buy female slaves and end up fighting over them.
